title: frogg's Aether
description: This mod adds an Aether dimension
body: Adds an Aether dimension, pretty cool right? Cool for survival up there. I do not recommend this mod if your looking for a good example, However, it is a good mod if your looking for a floating island. This mod does not include the aether just in the sky. You have to make a portal out of glowstone and light it with rope and sticks. It has low quality textures because i dont know how to texture, you will not find the glowstone in the custom creative tab you'll have to search for it in the search tab or crafting and nether. This mod does not contain more islands (i think). Do not download this unless you really want to, i did not do that great of a job on it. **WARNING: THIS IS STILL IN BETA YOU MIGHT EXPERIENCE SOME BUGS** please join the discord if you would like to report a bug. Thank you for supporting my mod.
